name: Atlas Arteria
analysis: ALX's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 0% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (4.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$5.0800. Trade idea: entry A$5.1100, stop A$4.8312, target A$5.9464 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
